_help: Keys named _doc_X are pure documentation — the loader ignores any

default._doc_ASK_DL_TIMEOUT: Seconds the bot waits for the user to click the download confirmation button. Min 1, max 60.
default._doc_ASK_LANG_TIMEOUT: Seconds the bot waits for the user to choose a dub language (YouTube). Min 1, max 60.
default._doc_ASK_CAPTION_TIMEOUT: Seconds the bot waits for the user to choose include/discard social media caption. Min 1, max 60.
default._doc_ASK_ARTICLE_TIMEOUT: Seconds the bot waits for the user to choose include/discard extracted article body. Min 1, max 60.
default._doc_ASK_SCREENSHOT_TIMEOUT: Seconds the bot waits for the user to choose taking a screenshot when the scraper fails. Min 1, max 60.
default._doc_ASK_DL_DEFAULT: Behavior on download prompt timeout. "yes" downloads automatically, "no" ignores.
default._doc_ASK_CAPTION_DEFAULT: Behavior on caption prompt timeout. "yes" includes the social media description, "no" sends without caption.
default._doc_ASK_ARTICLE_DEFAULT: Behavior on article prompt timeout. "yes" sends the article body as caption, "no" discards it.
default._doc_ASK_SCREENSHOT_DEFAULT: Behavior on screenshot prompt timeout. "yes" takes the screenshot, "no" falls back to fail + retry.
default._doc_PROMPT_DOWNLOAD_ENABLED: true shows the "Download/Ignore" prompt before starting download. false downloads directly.
default._doc_PROMPT_CAPTION_ENABLED: true asks whether to include the caption when description is found. false respects ASK_CAPTION_DEFAULT silently.
default._doc_PROMPT_LANG_ENABLED: true shows language picker when YouTube video has dubbing. false downloads the original language directly.
default._doc_MAX_URLS_PER_MESSAGE: Max URLs processed in a single Telegram message (protects against paste-bombs). Min 1, max 50.
default._doc_YTDLP_MAX_HEIGHT: Max video height (pixels) to download. 480/720 (SD/HD), 1080 (Full HD), 1920 (1440p), 2160 (4K), 4320 (8K). Min 144.
default._doc_YTDLP_SOCKET_TIMEOUT: yt-dlp socket timeout (seconds) when downloading from any platform. Min 30, max 600.
default._doc_YTDLP_YT_CLIENTS: CSV list of YouTube extractor clients (yt-dlp), in attempt order. Common: "ios,mweb,web". Tweak if YouTube breaks.
default._doc_DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: Per-file timeout (seconds) for individual aiohttp downloads (outside yt-dlp). Min 5, max 120.
default._doc_SCRAPE_MAX_PARALLEL_DOWNLOADS: How many files the generic scraper downloads in parallel (gather + semaphore). Min 1, max 20.
default._doc_SCRAPE_MAX_MEDIA_URLS: Hard limit on candidate URLs to download — protects against pages with thousands of images. Min 1, max 500.
default._doc_SCRAPE_SCROLL_MAX_ROUNDS: How many scrolls Playwright performs to load lazy-loaded content. Stops automatically when stable. Min 0, max 20.
default._doc_SCRAPE_SCROLL_PAUSE_MS: Pause (ms) between each scroll to let lazy-load fire. Min 500, max 10000.
default._doc_SCRAPE_MIN_IMAGE_SIZE: Minimum size (pixels) of the image's smallest dimension accepted by the scraper — filters icons and tracking pixels. Min 1, max 500.
default._doc_SCRAPE_HLS_TIMEOUT_S: ffmpeg timeout (seconds) when muxing HLS/DASH streams into mp4. Min 30, max 600.
default._doc_SCRAPE_FAST_PATH_TIMEOUT_S: Scraper fast-path HTTP timeout (seconds) (curl_cffi with Chrome impersonation). Min 5, max 60.
default._doc_SCRAPE_SCREENSHOT_FALLBACK: "yes" offers page screenshot when the scraper finds no media. "no" disables the prompt.
default._doc_SCRAPE_GALLERY_DL_ENABLE: "yes" enables the gallery-dl tier in the scraper (Pinterest, Imgur, Tumblr, etc.). "no" disables it.
default._doc_SCRAPE_PAYWALL_BYPASS: "yes" attempts soft paywall bypass (Googlebot UA + archive.ph). "no" respects the original block.
default._doc_SCRAPE_ARCHIVE_TIMEOUT_S: Timeout (seconds) when fetching the archived version via archive.ph. Min 5, max 60.
default._doc_SCRAPE_ARTICLE_EXTRACT: "yes" extracts article body (trafilatura) and offers as caption. "no" disables.
default._doc_SCRAPE_ARTICLE_MIN_CHARS: Minimum extracted chars to consider the page a real article. Min 100, max 2000.
default._doc_MEDIA_GROUP_CHUNK_SIZE: Chunk size when sending multiple media (sendMediaGroup). Telegram caps at 10. Min 1, max 10.
default._doc_MEDIA_GROUP_DELAY: Delay (seconds) between chunks of 10 media. Controls flood-risk in chats receiving lots of files. Min 0, max 30.
default._doc_STATUS_CYCLE_INTERVAL: Interval (seconds) between status message rotations during download. Min 1, max 30.
default._doc_IG_CAPTION_MAX: Max Instagram caption size (chars) before truncating with "...". Min 100, max 2200 (IG's limit).
default._doc_THREADS_MIN_IMAGE_SIZE: Min Threads image size (pixels) — filters out UI thumbnails. Min 1, max 1000.
default._doc_PW_GOTO_TIMEOUT_MS: page.goto() timeout (milliseconds) for all Playwright navigations. Min 5000, max 120000.
default._doc_TELEGRAM_UPLOAD_TIMEOUT: Read/write timeout (seconds) when uploading large files to Telegram. Min 30, max 3600.
default._doc_IG_QUEUE_WARN_THRESHOLD: Instagrapi queue size that triggers a warning log. Min 1, max 100.
default._doc_SAFE_URL_MAX_LENGTH: Max URL size (chars) when logging — rest is truncated. Min 50, max 1000.
default._doc_IG_USER_AGENT: User-Agent used to download audio from Instagram (outside instagrapi). If IG blocks it, swap for a newer version.
default._doc_REDDIT_JSON_UA: User-Agent used in Reddit JSON API requests. Reddit detects bot UAs — use a realistic one.
default.REDDIT_JSON_UA: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:123.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/123.0
